/usr/bin/ar qc libpotrace.a CMakeFiles/potrace.dir/bitmap_io.cpp.o CMakeFiles/potrace.dir/curve.cpp.o CMakeFiles/potrace.dir/decompose.cpp.o CMakeFiles/potrace.dir/greymap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/potrace.dir/potracelib.cpp.o CMakeFiles/potrace.dir/render.cpp.o CMakeFiles/potrace.dir/trace.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libpotrace.a
